summary: Iteration-3 testing of PDF fixes (embedded FreeSans font, DD/MM/YYYY, invoice_no filename, X-Invoice-No header, no header overlap), aggregation-based perf endpoints (/dashboard, /parties, /invoices), and Tier-2 friendly frontend (Quick Start guide + plain-language sidebar). RESULTS: 51/51 backend tests pass (42 existing regression + 9 new iter-3). Frontend: all critical flows green — friendly metric labels, Quick Start banner with localStorage dismiss flag, sidebar with 12 plain-language labels and full data-testid coverage, PDF download from /sales with correct filename + >15KB size + valid PDF magic, theme toggle, Welcome+Active badge.

issues: Pre-existing Recharts 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' warning still spams console on first paint (sales 6-month chart). Iter-1 & iter-2 action item not yet addressed. Likely a 0-width container during initial render before flex layout settles. Fix: wrap ResponsiveContainer in a sized div (e.g. h-72 w-full) or set minWidth=0 explicitly.

Test pollution: owner@vijaytraders.in now has 12+ TEST_* orgs from prior automation; the default-org-on-login still selects an arbitrary first membership (this iteration the test_Co_2930d8 org was active by default until I clicked Vijay Traders). Recommend implementing 'last active org' preference OR a cleanup utility.

action_items: Wrap dashboard charts ResponsiveContainer in a sized parent (e.g. <div className='h-72 w-full'>) to silence Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warning — third iteration this has been reported.

Implement 'last active org' preference (store last picked org_id against user in DB; return it as default org_id on login) — currently login returns arbitrary first membership which causes confusing default state when user owns many orgs.
Provide a one-shot cleanup of TEST_* orgs (script or admin endpoint) — demo owner now has 12+ test orgs.
critical_code_review_comments: pdf_invoice.py correctly registers FreeSans/FreeSansBold under names BillEasySans/Bold; embedded font appears in PDF byte stream (verified). PDF size for INV-2026-0006 = 24978 bytes (>15KB threshold). Magic %PDF- valid.
Content-Disposition uses invoice_no as filename (e.g. 'INV-2026-0006.pdf') — verified end-to-end via browser download.
X-Invoice-No response header equals invoice_no — verified.

Dashboard now uses $group / $unwind aggregation pipelines for top_customers and top_products; recent_invoices includes party_name. All 11 required keys present and numerically consistent (sales_total > 0 in test org after creating one same-month invoice).
Parties balance field is consistent with the running balance at the end of /api/parties/{id}/ledger (verified on 3 parties; matched within 0.5 INR).

Invoices list each row has party_name + paid + due, and due == totals.grand_total - paid (within 1 INR rounding). NOTE: spec mentioned a top-level `grand_total` field but implementation keeps it under `totals.grand_total`. Cosmetic mismatch with spec wording, not a bug.
Org isolation is rock solid: dashboard/parties/invoices/top_products/top_customers in a fresh org show only that org's data; Vijay Traders unaffected after creating data in new org.

Sidebar has all 12 data-testid (nav-dashboard, nav-parties, nav-products, nav-sales, nav-purchases, nav-payments, nav-expenses, nav-gst, nav-accounting, nav-tds, nav-billing, nav-settings) and plain-language labels.
QuickStartGuide localStorage flag 'be_qsg_hidden'='1' correctly persists dismissal.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter3_pdf_perf_isolation.py (NEW — 9 tests: PDF font/filename/size/header; dashboard aggregation schema; party balance vs ledger; invoice list shape; full org isolation incl. dashboard top_customers/top_products)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 11 critical flows verified: login, friendly labels, QSG banner+navigate+dismiss, sidebar labels+testids, org switcher, /sales PDF download with correct filename and >15KB, theme toggle, Welcome+Active badge, dates in DD/MM/YYYY)

test_credentials: owner@vijaytraders.in/admin123, accountant@vijaytraders.in/accountant123, sales@vijaytraders.in/sales123 — all valid; bcrypt $2b$ format verified previously
seed_data_creation: Each iter-3 test run creates one new TEST_ISO3_* org with one customer, one product, one invoice. Cumulatively, the demo owner now has 12+ TEST_* orgs across iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three pytest files now live in /app/backend/tests/: test_billeasy.py (regression, 26 tests), test_multiorg_billing.py (multi-org + billing + members + PDF + guard, 16 tests), test_iter3_pdf_perf_isolation.py (PDF font/filename/size, dashboard agg schema, party balance, invoice list shape, dashboard isolation, 9 tests). All use H(token, org_id) helper and read REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Dashboard sales_total filters by current calendar month — if the server's 'today' is e.g. June 2026, an invoice dated 2026-01-15 will NOT contribute to dashboard sales_total. Use today's ISO date when seeding for dashboard tests. Frontend uses page.content() which encodes & as & — use page.evaluate('() => document.body.innerText') to assert visible text. Default org on login is still arbitrary first membership; switch to Vijay Traders via the org switcher before any PDF/invoice-list UI test.
rca_of_the_issue: No new bugs introduced in iter-3. Two test-side gotchas resolved: (1) invoice list spec mentioned top-level `grand_total` but it actually lives in totals.grand_total; (2) dashboard sales_total is current-month-only, so seed invoices must use today's date. Frontend sidebar label assertion must use innerText (not HTML) because & is encoded as & in markup.
